prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程 、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年位列第17名（Top20），近年排名稳中有升（2021年第18名→2026年第17名），学校综合实力处于全国顶尖梯队；20 25年声誉评价中性/混合，有科研成果重大荣誉正面信号；2026年声誉偏负面，涉及师德师风事件及考研压分舆情，可能对报考心理产生轻微抑制作用。抖音热度排名第44位（较 热），短视频曝光量处于中上水平，报考关注度尚可。历史投档异常记录中未见人大在青海省的断档信号；第五轮学科评估中，中国人民大学拥有A+学科9个（ 法学、理论经济学、应用经济学、工商管理、社会学、新闻传播学、统计学、中国语言文学、马克思主义理论），A级学科3个（中国史、外国语言文学、计算机科学与技术），A- 学科3个（哲学、政治学、物理学），A-及以上共15个，人文社科领域实力全国顶尖。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the lowest science rankings were approximately 57, 52, 88, and 543 respectively. Rankings were stable in the 50–90 range from 2021 to 2023, but a significant drop occurred in 2024 (from 88 to 543), mainly due to the launch of the new college entrance examination reform in Qinghai Province that year, with the subject classification shifting from traditional science to physics category. The baseline ranking for 2025, referencing the 2024 trend, is estimated at about 580. The university's enrollment plan in Qinghai for science (physics category) was: 4 in 2021, 3 in 2022, 3 in 2023, and 3 in 2024. In 2026, the physics category plan is only 1 person, a reduction of about 67% compared to the estimated 3 in 2025, a significant reduction that will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranks 17th (Top 20), with a stable upward trend in recent years (from 18th in 2021 to 17th in 2026). The university's comprehensive strength is at the top tier nationally. The reputation evaluation for 2025 is neutral/mixed, with positive signals from major scientific research achievements. The reputation for 2026 is somewhat negative, involving incidents of teacher ethics and graduate exam score suppression, which may have a slight inhibitory effect on application psychology. Douyin popularity ranks 44th (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level, indicating moderate application attention. No historical abnormal admission records (e.g., gaps) for Renmin University in Qinghai. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Renmin University has 9 A+ disciplines (Law, Theoretical Economics, Applied Economics, Business Administration, Sociology, Journalism and Communication, Statistics, Chinese Language and Literature, Marxist Theory), 3 A-level disciplines (Chinese History, Foreign Languages and Literature, Computer Science and Technology), and 3 A- disciplines (Philosophy, Political Science, Physics), totaling 15 A- and above, with top national strength in humanities and social sciences.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The corresponding major categories of Renmin University's advantageous majors (Law, Finance/Economics/Economy, Journalism and Communication) have differentiated social popularity: Law is hot but competitive, Finance/Economics/Economy is divided and wait-and-see, and Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. The total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Qinghai Province in 2026 is about 48,000 (data marked as uncertain), roughly consistent with the 2025 total of 17,212 history category plus 30,457 physics category, totaling about 47,669, indicating a stable candidate scale. Renmin University of China is located in Beijing, with a very small enrollment proportion in Qinghai (3 science and 4 arts in 2024), making it a cross-provincial enrollment. The small candidate scale in Qinghai (about 48,000) limits the impact of regional factors on application preferences for top universities.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant drop in science rankings in 2024, the reduction of physics category enrollment plan from about 3 to 1 in 2026 (a 67% reduction intensifying competition), the sustained attraction of the university's top tier (Soft Science 17th) for high-scoring candidates, and the slight inhibitory effect of negative reputation, based on the 2025 baseline of about 580, the predicted lowest science ranking for 2026 is about 368, with a range of 331–405.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Renmin University of China only admits one major in the physics category in Qinghai (Statistics, with a plan of 1 person), making competition extremely intense. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range (331–405) can attempt to apply, but should be prepared for only one major option. Those with rankings significantly better than the upper limit (<331) have a higher probability of admission. It is recommended to also consider statistics and data science related majors at other universities as alternatives.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the minimum rankings for liberal arts were approximately 22nd, 24th, 24th, and 20th respectively. The overall ranking is stable in the 20–24 range with minimal fluctuation, with a 4-year average of about 22nd, indicating that Renmin University's liberal arts program holds an absolute top position in Qinghai Province with a highly stable competitive landscape. The 2025 baseline ranking references the historical average, estimated at about 22nd; the university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Qinghai Province: 3 students in 2021, 4 in 2023, 4 in 2024; the 2026 history category plan is 6 students, a 50% increase from the estimated 4 in 2025, a significant expansion that will alleviate competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 17th (Top 20) in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, leading nationally in humanities and social sciences, known as the 'highest hall for liberal arts students'; the 2025 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed (positive for major scientific research achievements); the 2026 reputation is somewhat negative, involving incidents of teacher ethics and graduate exam score suppression. Douyin popularity ranks 44th (relatively hot), with mid-to-high exposure on short video platforms.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is relatively hot (top of the Five Academies and Four Departments), finance/finance/economics is divided and wait-and-see, journalism and communication is clearly discouraged, Chinese language/Chinese literature is recommended. The total number of examinees in Qinghai Province in 2026 is about 48,000, roughly the same as in 2025, with a stable competitive environment. Renmin University of China is located in Beijing, with a very small proportion of liberal arts enrollment in Qinghai Province, typical of cross-provincial enrollment. The scale of liberal arts examinees in Qinghai is about 17,000, and the popularity of top universities is limitedly affected by regional preferences; overall reputation has limited impact on top liberal arts students' willingness to apply; Renmin University has A+ disciplines in liberal arts: Law, Theoretical Economics, Applied Economics, Business Administration, Sociology, Journalism and Communication, Statistics, Chinese Language and Literature, Marxist Theory; A-level: Chinese History, Foreign Languages and Literatures, Computer Science and Technology; A-: Philosophy, Political Science, Physics. The comprehensive strength in humanities and social sciences is among the top two in the country.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the long-term stable historical trend of liberal arts rankings in the 20–24 range, the 2026 history category enrollment plan expanding from about 4 to 6 students (a 50% increase alleviating competition), and Renmin University's top reputation in liberal arts (Soft Science ranked 17th, 9 A+ disciplines) continuing to attract high-scoring students, on the basis of the 2025 baseline of about 22nd, the predicted minimum ranking for liberal arts in 2026 is about 32nd, with a range of 24–40.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Renmin University of China will expand enrollment in Qinghai's history category to 6 students (4 major categories), increasing admission opportunities compared to previous years. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range (24–40) can actively apply; those with rankings better than the lower limit (<24) can focus on sprinting for top majors like Law and Finance; those with rankings near the upper limit (about 40) are advised to primarily consider the Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class, while also paying attention to backup options at other top universities.
